name: pr-review-automation
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Adding PR review/fix automation to implement_issues.py. Use when: (1) building a two-phase Claude workflow (read-only analysis then full-tools fix) for PR remediation, (2) creating a new SRP automation class alongside IssueImplementer, (3) adding Enum/State/Options model trios to scylla/automation/models.py, (4) gathering GitHub PR context (diff, CI logs, review comments) via gh CLI.
